_meta.note: Phase 1: schedules block added. index.html reads schedules.mlb for full schedule. game_overlays remain for backward compat.

game_overlays.matchupNote: The Knicks look to seize a commanding 2-0 Finals lead tonight, but the Spurs must protect their home court to avoid heading to Madison Square Garden facing a desperate, season-defining deficit. With the series momentum hanging in the balance, San Antonio’s ability to counter New York’s physicality will determine if this championship clash remains a contest or becomes a coronation.

The Giants arrive at Wrigley Field desperate to salvage their fading postseason aspirations against a Cubs squad looking to play spoiler in the final stretch. With both teams clinging to slim playoff hopes, tonight’s opener serves as a high-stakes elimination test where only a sweep will keep the dream alive.

The Mariners roll into Detroit desperate to salvage their fading postseason hopes against a Tigers squad riding a wave of late-summer momentum. With Seattle’s offense under the microscope, every pitch tonight serves as a high-stakes referendum on their ability to stay relevant in the Wild Card hunt.

The struggling White Sox look to avoid further embarrassment as they face a Phillies squad eager to pad their lead atop the National League standings. Philadelphia enters as heavy favorites, leaving Chicago desperate to prove they can still compete against the league’s elite.

The Red Sox roll into the Bronx desperate to claw back into the Wild Card hunt, but they’ll have to overcome a surging Yankees squad looking to tighten their grip on the AL East. With the postseason race intensifying, every pitch in this storied rivalry carries massive weight as both clubs fight for critical October positioning.

The Orioles look to tighten their grip on the AL East as they open a high-stakes series against a desperate Blue Jays squad fighting to stay relevant in the playoff hunt. With Baltimore’s postseason ticket nearly punched, Toronto faces a must-win scenario to prove they still have a pulse in the division race.

The Rays look to keep their flickering postseason pulse alive as they open a critical Sunshine State showdown against a Marlins squad playing strictly for pride. With Tampa Bay’s playoff window rapidly closing, every pitch in Miami tonight carries the weight of a must-win scenario.

The Pirates look to keep their flickering postseason hopes on life support as they open a critical series against a Braves squad desperate to solidify their grip on the National League Wild Card. With every game now carrying playoff-level intensity, Atlanta must defend home turf against a Pittsburgh rotation fighting to prove they belong in the October conversation.

The A’s roll into Houston looking to play spoiler, but the Astros need this series to tighten their grip on the AL West and keep their postseason positioning secure. With the division race heating up, every win is a must-have for Houston as they fend off a surging Seattle squad.

The Reds and Cardinals collide in a pivotal divisional clash tonight, with both clubs desperate to gain ground and salvage their fading postseason aspirations. Expect a high-stakes showdown as these bitter rivals battle to prove who still has a pulse in the crowded National League hunt.

The Guardians look to fortify their AL Central lead as they open a high-stakes series against a Rangers squad desperate to salvage their fading postseason aspirations. With Cleveland chasing top-seed positioning and Texas fighting for survival, every pitch in Arlington carries massive playoff implications.
The Royals roll into Minneapolis looking to tighten their grip on the AL Central, but the desperate Twins need a win tonight to keep their fading division title hopes on life support.

The Brewers look to tighten their grip on the NL Central as they roll into Coors Field, where the Rockies aim to play spoiler and derail Milwaukee’s postseason positioning. With every game critical in the stretch run, the Brew Crew must navigate the thin air to avoid a costly stumble against a dangerous home underdog.

The Diamondbacks look to tighten their grip on a crowded Wild Card race as they host a Nationals squad playing exclusively for the spoiler role. With every game critical in the desert, Arizona must capitalize on this favorable home stretch to avoid slipping out of postseason position.

The Mets head to Petco Park desperate to gain ground in a crowded Wild Card race, but they’ll have to solve a surging Padres squad looking to cement their status as the National League’s hottest team. With both clubs fighting for postseason positioning, tonight’s clash serves as a high-stakes litmus test for two teams trending in opposite directions.
